comparison.title: Managed platform vs DIY tools

rows.competitor: Usually only chat or only voice
rows.us: WhatsApp + phone + web chat + email unified
OpenClaw: autonomous agents that decide and act
Human voice HD, indistinguishable from a person

social_proof.title: Secure and managed AI infrastructure
social_proof.subtitle: EU servers, human support and continuous availability.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about AI agents
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about implementation, privacy and how AI agents work

items.q: Does the AI agent really sound human?
items.a: Yes. We use proprietary human voice technology with voices indistinguishable from real people. Your customers don't know they're talking to AI.
Between 2 and 6 weeks, depending on complexity. We handle everything — you just give us access.

items.q: What do I need to provide?
items.a: Access to your CRM (if any), information about your products/services and access to channels (WhatsApp, etc.). We do the rest.

items.q: What if the agent can't answer?
items.a: It transfers the conversation to a human on your team with full interaction context. No information is ever lost.
Own infrastructure in the EU, designed to facilitate GDPR compliance. The data is yours.

items.q: Do I need a technical team?
items.a: No. We configure, manage and maintain everything. Your business just needs to use the service.

chat.title: 24/7 AI Chat Support

phone.title: AI Phone Receptionist
phone.description: Professional AI voice assistant that answers calls, takes messages, and books appointments when you're busy or closed.

calendar.title: Smart Appointment Booking
calendar.description: Automated scheduling system that checks availability, books appointments, and sends confirmations without human intervention.

email.title: Email Response Automation
email.description: AI-powered email assistant that responds to inquiries, provides information, and forwards complex queries to your team.

leads.title: Lead Qualification & Handoff
leads.description: Intelligent system that qualifies prospects, gathers key information, and seamlessly hands off hot leads to your sales team.

integrations.title: Multi-Platform Integration

welcome.title: Your AI command centre
welcome.description: This is the unified inbox where your AI team handles all channels: WhatsApp, phone, email and web chat. All in one place.

unified_inbox.title: All conversations here
unified_inbox.description: Every conversation, regardless of channel, appears in this list. With lifecycle badges, assigned agent and last message.

channels.title: Connected channels
channels.description: Set up your communication channels: WhatsApp, phone, email, web chat. All connected from day one.

channel_catalog.title: Channel catalog
channel_catalog.description: WhatsApp, TikTok, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, Viber, LINE and more — connect all your channels in one click.

contacts.title: Contact management
contacts.description: All your contacts centralized with full history, tags, lifecycle stage and AI-enriched data.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect CRM, calendar, productivity tools and more. Native integration with HubSpot, Salesforce, Cal.com.

automation.title: Automations
automation.description: Automatic rules that assign conversations, change lifecycle stages, send notifications and execute actions hands-free.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Send mass messages via WhatsApp, email and SMS. Segment by lifecycle, tags or any contact field.

ai_conversation.title: AI responding automatically
ai_conversation.description: The AI agent greets the customer and starts the conversation. Natural voice, instant responses, no waiting.

ai_qualifying.title: Intelligent qualification
ai_qualifying.description: The AI agent collects email, company and customer needs. Qualifies automatically without human intervention.

contact_enrichment.title: Enriched contact data
contact_enrichment.description: Email and company auto-detected by AI. Fields fill themselves — notice the ✨ icon next to each field.

lifecycle.title: From lead to customer
lifecycle.description: Lifecycle stage updates automatically: New Lead → Hot Lead → Customer. The AI decides based on the conversation.

booking.title: Automatic scheduling
booking.description: The AI agent suggests available slots and books the meeting automatically. Cal.com integration included.

team_handoff.title: Smart team handoff
team_handoff.description: When the lead is qualified, the AI notifies your sales team (@Sales team) with full conversation context.

crm.title: Integrated CRM
crm.description: Deal created automatically in the CRM with estimated value and pipeline stage. No manual data entry.

ai_agents.title: AI agents working 24/7
ai_agents.description: The AI Sales Agent handles 50+ simultaneous conversations. No queues, no wait times, no limited hours.

reports.title: Real-time metrics
reports.description: Dashboard with conversations handled, resolution rate, response time and weekly activity. Everything measurable.

settings.title: Simple configuration
settings.description: Channels, languages, CRM and calendar — all configured and managed by our team. You just see results.

multilanguage.title: Multilingual support
multilanguage.description: The AI detects the customer's language and responds accordingly. Spanish, Portuguese, English and more — automatically.

cta_final.title: Ready to transform your customer service?
cta_final.description: Request a personalized demo and we'll show you how it works with your real business. No commitment, in 30 minutes.
